label: Improved
items: All harvest tasks now use a single canonical type — "Harvesting". The codebase used to carry both "Harvest" (legacy, from Save-to-Shed and Companion Plants) and "Harvesting" (canonical), which showed up as two separate labels with the same amber dot in some places. They're now collapsed into one across every existing task, blueprint and plant schedule, and both creators that produced the legacy name now emit "Harvesting" going forward.
The defensive code that accepted either spelling stays in place under the hood, so any rare task that slips through from an offline queue or stale cache still behaves correctly.
